Subject: Equity Research Analyst Note on Stellar Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456K)

Dear Colleagues,

Following our recent analysis, we would like to provide an update on Stellar Pte. Ltd. ahead of their forthcoming earnings release scheduled for next week. Our research suggests a potential revenue increase of approximately 9% year-over-year, driven by strong sales in their new product line.

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, CFO of Stellar, indicated that the company has maintained its strategic initiatives despite some delays in the project plan execution. Mr. John Tan Wei Ming, CEO, also expressed confidence in achieving their quarterly targets.

Please note, the information herein is confidential and should not be disclosed without prior authorization. For further queries, contact Dr. Lim at +65 6123 4567 or lim.analyst@research.sg.

For more details, access the full report at https://reports.stellar.sg/S2345678B. The SPA we referenced previously remains central to our valuation model. As per our last communication, any changes in project status should be promptly reported.

Best regards,
Dr. Priya Ramasamy
Equity Research Department
Suntech Research Group
NRIC: S9876543Z
